name_en: P Nikin suede with cowhide. A classic bestseller with new arrivals! Perfectly replicates the highest quality! Full leather interior and exterior, vintage hardware, delicate touch. Even cooler when worn crossbody, simply irresistible. Dimensions 28x20x8cm, Code 498894
